tasks.subject: Task 1: Copy redumper unscramble fixtures
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Get the 46 redumper test fixtures into the repo so subsequent tasks have ground truth.

**Files:**
- Create: `testdata/unscramble/01_invalid_sync.0.pass` ... `46_zeroed_sector.10350.fail` (46 files copied verbatim from `~/redumper/tests/unscramble/`)
- Create: `testdata/unscramble/README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 46 fixture files byte-identical to upstream
- [ ] README credits upstream and notes GPL-3.0 inheritance
- [ ] `go build ./...` still succeeds

**Verify:** `diff -r ~/redumper/tests/unscramble/ testdata/unscramble/ | grep -v 'README.md'` â†’ empty

```json:metadata
{"files": ["testdata/unscramble/"], "verifyCommand": "diff -r ~/redumper/tests/unscramble/ testdata/unscramble/ | grep -v README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["46 fixtures copied byte-identical", "README with attribution"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement test-side oracle (Go port of redumper's descramble)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A Go port of `cd/cd_scrambler.ixx::descramble` lives in test code as ground-truth oracle.

**Files:**
- Create: `unscramble_oracle_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `oracleDescramble(scrambled []byte, lba *int32) (binForm []byte, verdict bool)` defined
- [ ] `TestOracleAgainstFixtures` passes for all 46 imported fixtures
- [ ] Test-only â€” not built into production binary

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run TestOracleAgainstFixtures -v` â†’ 46 PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["unscramble_oracle_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -run TestOracleAgainstFixtures -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["oracle ports redumper descramble verbatim", "46/46 fixtures match labels"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Implement classifyBinSector + isZeroed + fixture test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Production classifier in `ecma130.go` mirroring redumper's descramble decision but operating on the bin sector.

**Files:**
- Modify: `ecma130.go`
- Create: `unscramble_fixtures_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `classifyBinSector(bin []byte, expectedLBA int32) bool` defined
- [ ] `isZeroed(buf []byte) bool` helper added
- [ ] All 46 fixtures pass via fixture test using oracle
- [ ] No production callers yet; full suite green

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run TestClassifyAgainstFixtures -v` â†’ 46 PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ecma130.go", "unscramble_fixtures_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -run TestClassifyAgainstFixtures -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["classifyBinSector pure", "46/46 fixtures match labels", "no production callers yet"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Property test for classifier vs oracle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Randomized property test asserting classifier agrees with oracle.

**Files:**
- Create: `unscramble_property_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `TestClassifyMatchesOracleProperty` runs â‰Ą1000 iterations
- [ ] Each iteration: random sector + LBA â†’ oracle bin form + verdict; classifier must agree
- [ ] Runs in plain `go test ./...` (no build tag)

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run TestClassifyMatchesOracleProperty -v` â†’ PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["unscramble_property_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -run TestClassifyMatchesOracleProperty -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["1000+ iterations", "classifier and oracle agree on all generated inputs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire classifier into BuildEpsilonHat
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace unconditional `Scramble(&sec)` in bin-region branch with classifier-gated call. Thread `passThroughs` count through return tuple.

**Files:**
- Modify: `builder.go`, `unpack.go`, `pack.go`, `builder_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `BuildEpsilonHat` returns `(errLBAs, mismatched, passThroughs, err)`
- [ ] `buildHatAndDelta` returns analogous tuple
- [ ] All callers updated; full suite green
- [ ] Synthetic discs unaffected (passThroughs == 0)

**Verify:** `go test ./...` â†’ ok

```json:metadata
{"files": ["builder.go", "unpack.go", "pack.go", "builder_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BuildEpsilonHat passThroughs return", "all callers updated", "synthetic discs unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Plumb pass-through count through pack reporter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface pass-through count in `building scram prediction + delta` reporter step.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pack.go:142`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Reporter prints `N override(s), M pass-through(s), delta K bytes`
- [ ] No regressions

**Verify:** `go test ./...` â†’ ok

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pack.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reporter format includes pass-throughs", "no regressions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Bump container format version to 0x00 sentinel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set `containerVersion` to `0x00` and update unsupported-version error. The 0x00 value signals the in-flight `format/drop-scrambler-hash` branch to rebase.

**Files:**
- Modify: `manifest.go:17, 152`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `containerVersion = byte(0x00)`
- [ ] Error message names the rule change
- [ ] Full suite green

**Verify:** `go test ./...` â†’ ok

```json:metadata
{"files": ["manifest.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["containerVersion=0x00", "rejection message updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: synthDiscWithFailSector helper + e2e round-trip
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Synthetic fixture exercising the new pass-through path: pack â†’ unpack â†’ byte-equal scram.

**Files:**
- Modify: `fixtures_test.go` (helper)
- Modify: `e2e_test.go` (round-trip case)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Helper builds Mode 1 disc with one fail sector (valid sync, invalid mode 0xF7) at known LBA
- [ ] Bin and scram identical for that LBA
- [ ] Round-trip byte-equal
- [ ] Reporter shows â‰Ą1 pass-through during pack

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run TestE2EFailSectorRoundTrip -v` â†’ PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["fixtures_test.go", "e2e_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -run TestE2EFailSectorRoundTrip -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["synthDiscWithFailSector helper", "byte-equal round-trip", "reporter pass-through count > 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Tighten half-life e2e bounds (optional, fixture-gated)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Measure new delta + container sizes for half-life with fail-sector fix; tighten bound assertions.

**Optional**, only runs when `test-discs/half-life/` is present. If absent, either symlink from main worktree or skip â€” bounds stay at conservative 15 MB.

**Files:**
- Modify: `e2e_redump_test.go:64-65`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] (If fixture available) bounds tightened to measured value Ă— 1.1
- [ ] Build-tagged test passes

**Verify:** `go test -tags redump_data ./... -run TestE2ERoundTripRealDiscs/half-life -v`

